evidence_paragraphs.snippet: [Sam](wiki:Samwell_Tarly) and the few survivors from [the Fist](wiki:Battle_of_the_Fist_of_the_First_Men) are running south in the middle of night with a heavy snow falling. They are ringed by men...

[Grenn](wiki:Grenn) tries to get Sam to his feet, but the fat steward is too tired. Finally [Small Paul](wiki:Paul) arrives and carries Sam, but the three of them have fallen far behind the survivors...
